alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 5 at 12:04AM EST until March 6 at 12:00PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow and sleet
accumulations a coating to 2 inches...except 2-4 inches possible
north of route 2 in far northeast Massachusetts. Ice accumulations
a trace to one tenth of an inch.

* WHERE...The Connecticut River Valley in Connecticut and
Massachusetts, northwest Rhode Island, as well as eastern and
northeast Massachusetts.

* WHEN...From 5 PM Thursday to noon EST Friday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The Friday morning
commute will be impacted.

nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog and a chance of rain between 1pm and 5pm, then rain likely and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a high near 37. Northeast wind 7 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and areas of fog before 8pm, then sleet and rain and areas of fog between 8pm and 1am, then sleet and areas of fog and rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sleet and areas of fog and rain and snow before 1pm, then areas of fog and a chance of sleet and a chance of rain. Cloudy, with a high near 35. Northeast wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 7pm, then patchy fog between 7pm and 8pm, then a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Cloudy, with a high near 48. South wind 3 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 42. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before noon. Partly sunny, with a high near 52. West wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 37. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 54. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 42. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 60. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 42. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 58. Southwest wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
